[newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Tidal+island%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Tidal+island%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Tidal+island%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Tidal+island%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(October 2023)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

is a raised area of land within a [waterbody](/wiki/Body_of_water "Body of water"), which is connected to the larger mainland by a natural [isthmus](/wiki/Isthmus "Isthmus") or man-made [causeway](/wiki/Causeway "Causeway") that is exposed at low [tide](/wiki/Tide "Tide") and submerged at high tide, causing the land to switch between being a [promontory](/wiki/Promontory "Promontory")/[peninsula](/wiki/Peninsula "Peninsula") and an [island](/wiki/Island "Island") depending on tidal conditions.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Island accessible by foot at low tide

"Tide island" redirects here; not to be confused with [Tied island](/wiki/Tied_island "Tied island").

For an island which disappears at high tide, see [Vanishing island](/wiki/Vanishing_island "Vanishing island").

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
| [icon](/wiki/File:Question_book-new.svg) | This article **needs additional citations for [verification](/wiki/Wikipedia:Verifiability "Wikipedia:Verifiability")**. Please help [improve this article](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Tidal_island "Special:EditPage/Tidal island") by [adding citations to reliable sources](/wiki/Help:Referencing_for_beginners "Help:Referencing for beginners"). Unsourced material may be challenged and removed. *Find sources:* ["Tidal island"](https://www.google.com/search?as_eq=wikipedia&q=%22Tidal+island%22) – [news](https://www.google.com/search?tbm=nws&q=%22Tidal+island%22+-wikipedia&tbs=ar:1) **·** [newspapers](https://www.google.com/search?&q=%22Tidal+island%22&tbs=bkt:s&tbm=bks) **·** [books](https://www.google.com/search?tbs=bks:1&q=%22Tidal+island%22+-wikipedia) **·** [scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=%22Tidal+island%22) **·** [JSTOR](https://www.jstor.org/action/doBasicSearch?Query=%22Tidal+island%22&acc=on&wc=on) *(October 2023)* *([Learn how and when to remove this message](/wiki/Help:Maintenance_template_removal "Help:Maintenance template removal"))* |

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d7/Tidal_island_diagram.svg/250px-Tidal_island_diagram.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Tidal_island_diagram.svg)

Diagram of tidal island at low tide and high tide

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/00/England-Saint-Michaels-Mount-1900-1.jpg/250px-England-Saint-Michaels-Mount-1900-1.jpg)](/wiki/File:England-Saint-Michaels-Mount-1900-1.jpg)

[St Michael's Mount](/wiki/St_Michael%27s_Mount "St Michael's Mount"), [Cornwall](/wiki/Cornwall "Cornwall"), at high tide, [c.](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/circa#English "wikt:circa") 1900

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/4e/Cramond_Island_and_causeway_from_air.JPG/250px-Cramond_Island_and_causeway_from_air.JPG)](/wiki/File:Cramond_Island_and_causeway_from_air.JPG)

[Cramond Island](/wiki/Cramond_Island "Cramond Island"), [Scotland](/wiki/Scotland "Scotland"), at high tide: the causeway is submerged, but the anti-boat pylons are still visible

A **tidal island** is a raised area of land within a [waterbody](/wiki/Body_of_water "Body of water"), which is connected to the larger mainland by a natural [isthmus](/wiki/Isthmus "Isthmus") or man-made [causeway](/wiki/Causeway "Causeway") that is exposed at low [tide](/wiki/Tide "Tide") and submerged at high tide, causing the land to switch between being a [promontory](/wiki/Promontory "Promontory")/[peninsula](/wiki/Peninsula "Peninsula") and an [island](/wiki/Island "Island") depending on tidal conditions.

Because of the mystique surrounding tidal islands, many of them have been sites of [religious worship](/wiki/Place_of_worship "Place of worship"), such as [Mont-Saint-Michel](/wiki/Mont-Saint-Michel "Mont-Saint-Michel") with its [Benedictine](/wiki/Benedictine "Benedictine") [abbey](/wiki/Abbey "Abbey"). Tidal islands are also commonly the sites of [fortresses](/wiki/Fortification "Fortification") because of the natural barrier created by the tidal [channel](/wiki/Channel_(geography) "Channel (geography)").

## List of tidal islands

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: List of tidal islands")]

### Asia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Asia")]

#### Hong Kong

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Hong Kong")]

* [Ma Shi Chau](/wiki/Ma_Shi_Chau "Ma Shi Chau") in [Tai Po District](/wiki/Tai_Po_District "Tai Po District"), northeastern [New Territories](/wiki/New_Territories "New Territories"), within the [Tolo Harbour](/wiki/Tolo_Harbour "Tolo Harbour")
* Kiu Tau Island in Sai Kung

#### Iran

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Iran")]

* [Naaz islands](/wiki/Naaz_islands "Naaz islands") in the [Persian Gulf](/wiki/Persian_Gulf "Persian Gulf"), southern seashore of [Qeshm island](/wiki/Qeshm_island "Qeshm island")

#### Japan

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: Japan")]

* [Enoshima](/wiki/Enoshima "Enoshima"), in [Sagami Bay](/wiki/Sagami_Bay "Sagami Bay"), [Kanagawa Prefecture](/wiki/Kanagawa_Prefecture "Kanagawa Prefecture")

#### Taiwan

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: Taiwan")]

* [Kueibishan](/w/index.php?title=Kueibishan&action=edit&redlink=1 "Kueibishan (page does not exist)") in [Penghu](/wiki/Penghu "Penghu")
* [Jiangong Islet](/wiki/Jiangong_Islet "Jiangong Islet") in [Kinmen](/wiki/Kinmen "Kinmen")

#### South Korea

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: South Korea")]

* [Jindo Island](/wiki/Jindo_Island "Jindo Island") and [Modo Island](/wiki/Modo,_Jindo "Modo, Jindo") in southwest [South Korea](/wiki/South_Korea "South Korea")
* [Jebudo](/wiki/Jebudo "Jebudo") in the west

### Europe

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Europe")]

#### Denmark

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Denmark")]

* [Mandø](/wiki/Mand%C3%B8 "Mandø") Island – on Denmark's western coast
* [Knudshoved](/w/index.php?title=Knudshoved&action=edit&redlink=1 "Knudshoved (page does not exist)") Island – north of [Vordingborg](/wiki/Vordingborg "Vordingborg") on southern [Zealand](/wiki/Zealand "Zealand"), [Denmark](/wiki/Denmark "Denmark")

#### Denmark/Germany

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Denmark/Germany")]

* The [Halligen](/wiki/Halligen "Halligen") in the [North Frisian Islands](/wiki/North_Frisian_Islands "North Frisian Islands"), Denmark/Germany

#### France

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: France")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/d/d1/Mont_Saint-Michel_en_gros_plan.jpg/250px-Mont_Saint-Michel_en_gros_plan.jpg)](/wiki/File:Mont_Saint-Michel_en_gros_plan.jpg)

[Mont Saint-Michel](/wiki/Mont_Saint-Michel "Mont Saint-Michel") in [Normandy](/wiki/Normandy "Normandy")

* [Île Aganton](/wiki/%C3%8Ele_Aganton "Île Aganton") in Brittany
* [Île Madame](/wiki/%C3%8Ele_Madame "Île Madame") in [Charente-Maritime](/wiki/Charente-Maritime "Charente-Maritime")
* [Île de Noirmoutier](/wiki/%C3%8Ele_de_Noirmoutier "Île de Noirmoutier") in [Vendée](/wiki/Vend%C3%A9e "Vendée")
* [Mont Saint-Michel](/wiki/Mont_Saint-Michel "Mont Saint-Michel") in [Normandy](/wiki/Normandy "Normandy")
* [Tombelaine](/wiki/Tombelaine "Tombelaine") in Normandy
* Grand Bé, Petit Bé and Fort National in [Saint-Malo](/wiki/Saint-Malo "Saint-Malo")

#### Germany

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Germany")]

* The [Neuwerk](/wiki/Neuwerk "Neuwerk") in the [Wadden Sea](/wiki/Wadden_Sea "Wadden Sea")

#### Guernsey

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Guernsey")]

* [Lihou](/wiki/Lihou "Lihou") in [Guernsey](/wiki/Guernsey "Guernsey"), one of the [Channel Islands](/wiki/Channel_Islands "Channel Islands")

#### Iceland

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: Iceland")]

Grótta in [Seltjarnarnes](/wiki/Seltjarnarnes "Seltjarnarnes"), the [Capital Region](/wiki/Capital_Region_(Iceland) "Capital Region (Iceland)")

#### Ireland

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Ireland")]

* [Coney Island](/wiki/Coney_Island,_County_Sligo "Coney Island, County Sligo") near [Rosses Point](/wiki/Rosses_Point "Rosses Point"), [County Sligo](/wiki/County_Sligo "County Sligo")
* [Omey Island](/wiki/Omey_Island "Omey Island") in [Connemara](/wiki/Connemara "Connemara"), [County Galway](/wiki/County_Galway "County Galway")
* [Inishkeel](/wiki/Inishkeel "Inishkeel"), [County Donegal](/wiki/County_Donegal "County Donegal")

#### Italy

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Italy")]

* Isola Grande, [Sicily](/wiki/Sicily "Sicily")

#### Jersey

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=17 "Edit section: Jersey")]

* [Elizabeth Castle](/wiki/Elizabeth_Castle "Elizabeth Castle") in [Jersey](/wiki/Jersey "Jersey"), a castle off the south coast accessible on foot at low tide
* [Saint Aubin's Fort](/w/index.php?title=Saint_Aubin%27s_Fort&action=edit&redlink=1 "Saint Aubin's Fort (page does not exist)")
* [La Corbière Lighthouse](/wiki/La_Corbi%C3%A8re#Lighthouse "La Corbière")
* [La Motte, Jersey](/wiki/La_Motte,_Jersey "La Motte, Jersey"), alias Green Island
* L'Avarison, which hosts [Seymour Tower](/wiki/Seymour_Tower "Seymour Tower")
* Archirondel Tower, now connected via permanent causeway
* [Icho Tower](/w/index.php?title=Icho_Tower&action=edit&redlink=1 "Icho Tower (page does not exist)")
* Portelet Tower

#### Spain

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=18 "Edit section: Spain")]

* [Cortegada Island](/wiki/Cortegada_Island "Cortegada Island") in [Pontevedra](/wiki/Pontevedra_(province) "Pontevedra (province)") coast, [Galicia](/wiki/Galicia_(Spain) "Galicia (Spain)").
* San Nikolas Island in [Lekeitio](/wiki/Lekeitio "Lekeitio"), [Bizkaia](/wiki/Bizkaia "Bizkaia")

#### United Kingdom

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=19 "Edit section: United Kingdom")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/a/a2/Rough_Island_from_Tornat_Wood_-_geograph.org.uk_-_1305616.jpg/250px-Rough_Island_from_Tornat_Wood_-_geograph.org.uk_-_1305616.jpg)](/wiki/File:Rough_Island_from_Tornat_Wood_-_geograph.org.uk_-_1305616.jpg)

[Rough Island](/wiki/Rough_Island,_Scotland "Rough Island, Scotland") opposite [Rockcliffe, Dumfries & Galloway](/wiki/Rockcliffe,_Dumfries_%26_Galloway "Rockcliffe, Dumfries & Galloway"), Scotland

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/3e/Worm%27s_Head_%28Rhossili%29.jpg/250px-Worm%27s_Head_%28Rhossili%29.jpg)](/wiki/File:Worm%27s_Head_(Rhossili).jpg)

[Worm's Head](/wiki/Worm%27s_Head "Worm's Head") at the end of [Gower](/wiki/Gower_Peninsula "Gower Peninsula"), Wales

##### England

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=20 "Edit section: England")]

* [Asparagus Island](/wiki/Asparagus_Island "Asparagus Island"), Mount's Bay, [Cornwall](/wiki/Cornwall "Cornwall")
* [Burgh Island](/wiki/Burgh_Island "Burgh Island"), [Devon](/wiki/Devon "Devon")
* [Burrow Island](/wiki/Burrow_Island "Burrow Island"), [Portsmouth Harbour](/wiki/Portsmouth_Harbour "Portsmouth Harbour")
* [Chapel Island](/wiki/Chapel_Island "Chapel Island"), [Cumbria](/wiki/Cumbria "Cumbria")
* [Chiswick Eyot](/wiki/Chiswick_Eyot "Chiswick Eyot") in the [River Thames](/wiki/River_Thames "River Thames") in London
* [Dova Haw](/wiki/Dova_Haw "Dova Haw"), one of the [Islands of Furness](/wiki/Islands_of_Furness "Islands of Furness"), off the coast of [Cumbria](/wiki/Cumbria "Cumbria")
* [Gugh](/wiki/Gugh "Gugh") in the [Isles of Scilly](/wiki/Isles_of_Scilly "Isles of Scilly") (joined to St Agnes at low tide)
* [Headin Haw](/wiki/Headin_Haw "Headin Haw"), one of the [Islands of Furness](/wiki/Islands_of_Furness "Islands of Furness"), off the coast of [Cumbria](/wiki/Cumbria "Cumbria")
* [Hilbre Island](/wiki/Hilbre_Island "Hilbre Island"), Middle Eye and Little Eye in the [River Dee](/wiki/River_Dee,_Wales "River Dee, Wales") [estuary](/wiki/Estuary "Estuary"), between [North Wales](/wiki/North_Wales "North Wales") and the English [Wirral](/wiki/Wirral_Peninsula "Wirral Peninsula"), but administratively in England.
* [Horsey Island](/wiki/Horsey_Island "Horsey Island"), [Essex](/wiki/Essex "Essex")
* [Lindisfarne](/wiki/Lindisfarne "Lindisfarne"), [Northumberland](/wiki/Northumberland "Northumberland"), also known as Holy Island
* [Marsden Rock](/wiki/Marsden_Rock "Marsden Rock"), [South Tyneside](/wiki/South_Tyneside "South Tyneside"), [Tyne and Wear](/wiki/Tyne_and_Wear "Tyne and Wear")
* [Mersea Island](/wiki/Mersea_Island "Mersea Island"), Essex (accessible to road traffic via the Strood)
* [Northey Island](/wiki/Northey_Island "Northey Island"), Essex
* [Osea Island](/wiki/Osea_Island "Osea Island"), Essex
* [Piel Island](/wiki/Piel_Island "Piel Island"), Cumbria
* [Scolt Head Island](/wiki/Scolt_Head_Island "Scolt Head Island"), Norfolk
* [Sheep Island](/wiki/Sheep_Island_(England) "Sheep Island (England)"), [Cumbria](/wiki/Cumbria "Cumbria") (joined at low tide to Piel Island and to Walney Island)
* [St Mary's Island](/wiki/St_Mary%27s_Island,_Tyne_and_Wear "St Mary's Island, Tyne and Wear"), [North Tyneside](/wiki/North_Tyneside "North Tyneside")
* [St Michael's Mount](/wiki/St_Michael%27s_Mount "St Michael's Mount"), [Cornwall](/wiki/Cornwall "Cornwall")
* [White Island, Isles of Scilly](/wiki/White_Island,_Isles_of_Scilly "White Island, Isles of Scilly") and [St Martin's, Isles of Scilly](/wiki/St_Martin%27s,_Isles_of_Scilly "St Martin's, Isles of Scilly")

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/8/8e/Guns_Island_from_Ballyhornan_Bay_at_low_tide.jpg/250px-Guns_Island_from_Ballyhornan_Bay_at_low_tide.jpg)](/wiki/File:Guns_Island_from_Ballyhornan_Bay_at_low_tide.jpg)

Gunns Island, connected to [Ballyhornan](/wiki/Ballyhornan "Ballyhornan") Bay, [Northern Ireland](/wiki/Northern_Ireland "Northern Ireland") at low tide

* [Nendrum Monastery](/wiki/Nendrum_Monastery "Nendrum Monastery") on Mahee Island, [Strangford Lough](/wiki/Strangford_Lough "Strangford Lough")
* Guns Island, near [Ballyhornan](/wiki/Ballyhornan "Ballyhornan")
* Isle of Muck, [Portmuck](/wiki/Portmuck "Portmuck")
* Rough Island, near Comber, Strangford Lough

##### Scotland

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=22 "Edit section: Scotland")]

* [Baleshare](/wiki/Baleshare "Baleshare") in the [Outer Hebrides](/wiki/Outer_Hebrides "Outer Hebrides"), joined to [North Uist](/wiki/North_Uist "North Uist")
* [Bernera Island](/wiki/Bernera_Island "Bernera Island"), joined to [Lismore](/wiki/Lismore,_Scotland "Lismore, Scotland")
* [Brough of Birsay](/wiki/Brough_of_Birsay "Brough of Birsay") in [Orkney](/wiki/Orkney "Orkney"), joined to [Orkney Mainland](/wiki/Mainland,_Orkney "Mainland, Orkney")
* [Castle Stalker](/wiki/Castle_Stalker "Castle Stalker") on Loch Laich in [Argyll](/wiki/Argyll "Argyll")
* [Cramond Island](/wiki/Cramond_Island "Cramond Island") in the [Firth of Forth](/wiki/Firth_of_Forth "Firth of Forth")
* [Island Davaar](/wiki/Island_Davaar "Island Davaar") near [Campbeltown](/wiki/Campbeltown "Campbeltown"), off the [Kintyre](/wiki/Kintyre "Kintyre") peninsula
* Eilean [Arnoil](/wiki/Arnol "Arnol") in the [Outer Hebrides](/wiki/Outer_Hebrides "Outer Hebrides"), joined to the [Isle of Lewis](/wiki/Isle_of_Lewis "Isle of Lewis")
* [Eilean Donan](/wiki/Eilean_Donan "Eilean Donan") in the western [Highlands of Scotland](/wiki/Highlands_of_Scotland "Highlands of Scotland")
* [Eilean Fladday](/wiki/Eilean_Fladday "Eilean Fladday") and [Eilean Tigh](/wiki/Eilean_Tigh "Eilean Tigh") off the [Isle of Raasay](/wiki/Raasay "Raasay")
* [Eilean Shona](/wiki/Eilean_Shona "Eilean Shona") in [Loch Moidart](/wiki/Loch_Moidart "Loch Moidart"), [Lochaber](/wiki/Lochaber "Lochaber"), [Highland](/wiki/Highland_(council_area) "Highland (council area)")
* [Eilean Tioram](/wiki/Castle_Tioram "Castle Tioram"), in [Loch Moidart](/wiki/Loch_Moidart "Loch Moidart")
* [Erraid](/wiki/Erraid "Erraid") off the [Isle of Mull](/wiki/Isle_of_Mull "Isle of Mull")
* [Hestan Island](/wiki/Hestan_Island "Hestan Island") near [Rough Island](/wiki/Rough_Island,_Scotland "Rough Island, Scotland") in Auchencairn Bay
* [Islands of Fleet](/wiki/Islands_of_Fleet "Islands of Fleet"): Ardwall Isle and Barlocco Isle in [Galloway](/wiki/Galloway "Galloway")
* [Isle Ristol](/wiki/Isle_Ristol "Isle Ristol"), the innermost of the [Summer Isles](/wiki/Summer_Isles "Summer Isles")
* [Kili Holm](/wiki/Kili_Holm "Kili Holm") in [Orkney](/wiki/Orkney "Orkney"), joined to [Egilsay](/wiki/Egilsay "Egilsay")
* [Oronsay](/wiki/Oronsay,_Inner_Hebrides "Oronsay, Inner Hebrides") in the [Inner Hebrides](/wiki/Inner_Hebrides "Inner Hebrides"), joined to [Colonsay](/wiki/Colonsay "Colonsay")
* [Oronsay](/wiki/Oronsay,_Loch_Bracadale "Oronsay, Loch Bracadale") in [Loch Bracadale](/wiki/Loch_Bracadale "Loch Bracadale"), joined to [Skye](/wiki/Isle_of_Skye "Isle of Skye")
* [Orosay](/wiki/Orosay "Orosay") in the [Outer Hebrides](/wiki/Outer_Hebrides "Outer Hebrides"), joined to [Barra](/wiki/Barra "Barra")
* [Rough Island](/wiki/Rough_Island,_Scotland "Rough Island, Scotland") opposite [Rockcliffe, Dumfries & Galloway](/wiki/Rockcliffe,_Dumfries_%26_Galloway "Rockcliffe, Dumfries & Galloway")
* [Vallay](/wiki/Vallay "Vallay") (Bhàlaigh), joined to [North Uist](/wiki/North_Uist "North Uist") in the [Outer Hebrides](/wiki/Outer_Hebrides "Outer Hebrides")

Eilean a’ Chapuill ‘The Island of the Horse’ is an Island with boat house located in a situation of great natural scenic beauty just off the Knapdale peninsula which is between Loch Sween to the west and Loch Caolisport to the east.

##### Shetland

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=23 "Edit section: Shetland")]

* [Uyea, Northmavine](/wiki/Uyea,_Northmavine "Uyea, Northmavine"), off the [Northmavine](/wiki/Northmavine "Northmavine") peninsula

##### Wales

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=24 "Edit section: Wales")]

* [Burry Holms](/wiki/Burry_Holms "Burry Holms") off the [Gower](/wiki/Gower_Peninsula "Gower Peninsula")
* [Cribinau](/wiki/Cribinau "Cribinau") off [Anglesey](/wiki/Anglesey "Anglesey")
* [Gateholm](/wiki/Gateholm "Gateholm") off the south west coast of Pembrokeshire
* [Ynys Llanddwyn](/wiki/Llanddwyn_Island "Llanddwyn Island") off [Anglesey](/wiki/Anglesey "Anglesey")
* [Mumbles Lighthouse](/wiki/Mumbles_Lighthouse "Mumbles Lighthouse") located in Mumbles, near Swansea
* [St Catherine's Island](/wiki/St_Catherine%27s_Island "St Catherine's Island") in [Pembrokeshire](/wiki/Pembrokeshire "Pembrokeshire")
* [Sully Island](/wiki/Sully_Island "Sully Island") in the [Vale of Glamorgan](/wiki/Vale_of_Glamorgan "Vale of Glamorgan")
* [Worm's Head](/wiki/Worm%27s_Head "Worm's Head") at the end of the [Gower](/wiki/Gower_Peninsula "Gower Peninsula")
* [Ynys Cantwr](/wiki/Ynys_Cantwr "Ynys Cantwr") off [Ramsey Island](/wiki/Ramsey_Island "Ramsey Island"), Pembrokeshire
* [Ynys Feurig](/wiki/Ynys_Feurig "Ynys Feurig") off [Anglesey](/wiki/Anglesey "Anglesey")
* [Ynys Gifftan](/wiki/Ynys_Gifftan "Ynys Gifftan") in [Gwynedd](/wiki/Gwynedd "Gwynedd")
* [Ynys Gwelltog](/wiki/Ynys_Gwelltog "Ynys Gwelltog") off [Ramsey Island](/wiki/Ramsey_Island "Ramsey Island"), Pembrokeshire
* [Ynys Lochtyn](/wiki/Ynys_Lochtyn "Ynys Lochtyn") on the coast of Cardigan Bay

43 (unbridged) tidal islands can be walked to from the UK mainland.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

### North America

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=25 "Edit section: North America")]

#### Canada

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=26 "Edit section: Canada")]

* Bird Islet in Neck Point Park, Nanaimo, British Columbia, Canada
* Finisterre Island off of [Bowen Island](/wiki/Bowen_Island "Bowen Island"), [British Columbia](/wiki/British_Columbia "British Columbia"), Canada
* [Francis Peninsula](/wiki/Francis_Peninsula "Francis Peninsula") off of [Sunshine Coast (British Columbia)](/wiki/Sunshine_Coast_(British_Columbia) "Sunshine Coast (British Columbia)"), [British Columbia](/wiki/British_Columbia "British Columbia"), Canada
* [Micou's Island](/wiki/Micou%27s_Island,_Nova_Scotia "Micou's Island, Nova Scotia") in [St. Margarets Bay, Nova Scotia](/wiki/St._Margarets_Bay,_Nova_Scotia "St. Margarets Bay, Nova Scotia"), Canada
* [Minister's Island](/wiki/Minister%27s_Island "Minister's Island") in [New Brunswick](/wiki/New_Brunswick "New Brunswick"), Canada
* Ross Island and Cheney Island in [Grand Manan](/wiki/Grand_Manan "Grand Manan"), [New Brunswick](/wiki/New_Brunswick "New Brunswick"), Canada
* [Wedge Island](/wiki/Wedge_Island_(Nova_Scotia) "Wedge Island (Nova Scotia)"), [Nova Scotia](/wiki/Nova_Scotia "Nova Scotia"), Canada
* Whyte Islet in [West Vancouver](/wiki/West_Vancouver "West Vancouver"), [British Columbia](/wiki/British_Columbia "British Columbia"), Canada

[Bar Island](/wiki/Bar_Island "Bar Island") in [Maine](/wiki/Maine "Maine"), U.S.

* [Bar Island](/wiki/Bar_Island "Bar Island") in [Maine](/wiki/Maine "Maine")
* [Battery Point Light](/wiki/Battery_Point_Light "Battery Point Light") in [California](/wiki/California "California")
* [Bumpkin Island](/wiki/Bumpkin_Island "Bumpkin Island") in [Massachusetts](/wiki/Massachusetts "Massachusetts")
* [Camano Island](/wiki/Camano_Island "Camano Island") in [Puget Sound](/wiki/Puget_Sound "Puget Sound") of [Washington state](/wiki/Washington_(state) "Washington (state)"), since earth filled

### Oceania

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=28 "Edit section: Oceania")]

#### Australia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=29 "Edit section: Australia")]

* The [Point Walter](/wiki/Point_Walter "Point Walter") Sandbar in [Perth, Western Australia](/wiki/Perth,_Western_Australia "Perth, Western Australia") has slowly formed into a tidal island and is only connected to the mainland in extreme low tides.
* [Penguin Island (Western Australia)](/wiki/Penguin_Island_(Western_Australia) "Penguin Island (Western Australia)") in the [Shoalwater Islands Marine Park](/wiki/Shoalwater_Islands_Marine_Park "Shoalwater Islands Marine Park")
* Former tidal island Bennelong Island in [Sydney](/wiki/Sydney "Sydney"), Australia was developed into [Bennelong Point](/wiki/Bennelong_Point,_New_South_Wales "Bennelong Point, New South Wales") and is now the location of the [Sydney Opera House](/wiki/Sydney_Opera_House "Sydney Opera House").

#### New Zealand

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Tidal_island&action=edit&section=30 "Edit section: New Zealand")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/5f/Rangitoto_from_Achilles_Point.jpg/250px-Rangitoto_from_Achilles_Point.jpg)](/wiki/File:Rangitoto_from_Achilles_Point.jpg)

[Rangitoto Island](/wiki/Rangitoto_Island "Rangitoto Island") forms a backdrop to a [wave-cut platform](/wiki/Wave-cut_platform "Wave-cut platform") off [Achilles Point](/wiki/Achilles_Point "Achilles Point"), Auckland, New Zealand.

* [Kōpuahingahinga Island](/wiki/K%C5%8Dpuahingahinga_Island "Kōpuahingahinga Island"), [Pararekau Island](/wiki/Pararekau_Island "Pararekau Island") and [Te Toka-Tapu-a-Kupe / Ninepin Rock](/wiki/Te_Toka-Tapu-a-Kupe_/_Ninepin_Rock "Te Toka-Tapu-a-Kupe / Ninepin Rock") in [Manukau Harbour](/wiki/Manukau_Harbour "Manukau Harbour")
* [Matakana Island](/wiki/Matakana_Island "Matakana Island") in [Tauranga](/wiki/Tauranga "Tauranga") Harbour
* [Moturoa / Rabbit Island](/wiki/Moturoa_/_Rabbit_Island "Moturoa / Rabbit Island"), [Bells Island](/wiki/Bells_Island "Bells Island"), and [Bests Island](/wiki/Bests_Island "Bests Island") in [Tasman Bay](/wiki/Tasman_Bay "Tasman Bay")
* The [Okatakata Islands](/w/index.php?title=Okatakata_Islands&action=edit&redlink=1 "Okatakata Islands (page does not exist)") in [Rangaunu Harbour](/wiki/Rangaunu_Harbour "Rangaunu Harbour")
* [Opahekeheke Island](/wiki/Opahekeheke_Island "Opahekeheke Island") in the [Kaipara Harbour](/wiki/Kaipara_Harbour "Kaipara Harbour")
* Puddingstone Island in the [Otago Harbour](/wiki/Otago_Harbour "Otago Harbour")
* [Taieri Island / Moturata](/wiki/Taieri_Island_/_Moturata "Taieri Island / Moturata") in Otago
* [Taitomo Island](/wiki/Taitomo_Island "Taitomo Island") on the west coast of the [Auckland Region](/wiki/Auckland_Region "Auckland Region")
* The [Hauraki Gulf](/wiki/Hauraki_Gulf "Hauraki Gulf") islands of [Motutapu Island](/wiki/Motutapu_Island "Motutapu Island") and [Rangitoto Island](/wiki/Rangitoto_Island "Rangitoto Island") are connected at low tide
